property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

odejs;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0 in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\dipak\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\dipak\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\dipak\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Dipak\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users\dipak\Desktop\AutomationTesting\SQL_Testing\apache-maven-3.9.14-bin.zip\apache-maven-3.9.14 in;;.

Before click: https://www.flipkart.com/search?q=iPhone&otracker=search&otracker1=search&marketplace=FLIPKART&as-show=off&as=off Products found: 29 After click URL: https://www.flipkart.com/apple-iphone-16-pro-black-titanium-128-gb/p/itm12f97adb4c5ed?pid=MOBH4DQFVXNS5ZJH&lid=LSTMOBH4DQFVXNS5ZJHBZDANB&marketplace=FLIPKART&q=iPhone&store=tyy%2F4io&srno=s_1_1&otracker=search&otracker1=search&fm=organic&iid=2ac1e405-3d67-4475-8596-f24d6a03adb3.MOBH4DQFVXNS5ZJH.SEARCH&ppt=hp&ppn=homepage&ssid=fpbrjw8dog0000001775214613430&qH=867e57bd062c7169&ov_redirect=true After click: https://www.flipkart.com/apple-iphone-16-pro-black-titanium-128-gb/p/itm12f97adb4c5ed?pid=MOBH4DQFVXNS5ZJH&lid=LSTMOBH4DQFVXNS5ZJHBZDANB&marketplace=FLIPKART&q=iPhone&store=tyy%2F4io&srno=s_1_1&otracker=search&otracker1=search&fm=organic&iid=2ac1e405-3d67-4475-8596-f24d6a03adb3.MOBH4DQFVXNS5ZJH.SEARCH&ppt=hp&ppn=homepage&ssid=fpbrjw8dog0000001775214613430&qH=867e57bd062c7169&ov_redirect=true
